# MadJag Studios

MadJag Studios builds indie game tools and utility apps.

Canonical URL: https://madjagstudios.com/

## Hyland Helper

Canonical URL: https://madjagstudios.com/hyland-helper
App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/hyland-helper/id6761792150

Hyland Helper is an iOS companion app for Schedule 1. It helps players make better in-game decisions with:

- The Advisor: profile-aware answers based on rank, cash, properties, and setup.
- Mixing Calculator: recipe building and optimization for profit, ROI, or fast cash.
- Properties: quick reference for property stats, capacity, and usage.
- Progression Tracker: rank unlock planning so players know what comes next.

Hyland Helper is free to download with optional in-app purchases. It is an unofficial fan app and is not affiliated with TVGS or the Schedule 1 developers.

## Support and policies

- Privacy Policy: https://madjagstudios.com/privacy.html
